notes: Glass-box momentum rule (v0). No forward labels exist at N=1, so this emits a transparent 0-100 momentum index and p_breakout=null. Acceleration (2nd derivative) is the dominant weight per the LOFI route map: 'growth acceleration beats current size'. To upgrade: train_breakout.py writes a model_type='trained' file with learned weights once the trust gates in breakout_config.yaml pass; the scorer loads it through the same ModelProvider interface with no other change.
